title: Section 105B
content: 1[105B. Penalty for failure to comply with sections 32B, 32C and 32D. --If an insurer fails to comply with the provisions of section 32B, section 32C and section 32D, he shall be liable to a penalty not exceeding twenty-five crore rupees.]
footnote: 1. Subs. by s. 90, ibid., for sections 105B and 105C (w.e.f. 26-12-2014).
